allow: Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS smart_truck CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS trips FROM trips; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS drivers FROM drivers; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS vehicles FROM vehicles; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS locations FROM locations;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total FROM trips WHERE trip_duration_minutes IS NOT NULL AND trip_duration_minutes > 0 AND trip_duration_minutes < 50000 AND trip_km IS NOT NULL AND trip_km > 0 AND trip_start IS NOT NULL;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS with_km FROM trips WHERE trip_km IS NOT NULL AND trip_km > 0; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total FROM trips;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS has_total_dist FROM trips WHERE total_dist IS NOT NULL AND total_dist > 0; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS has_cover_dist FROM trips WHERE cover_dist IS NOT NULL AND cover_dist > 0; SELECT total_dist, cover_dist, trip_km FROM trips WHERE total_dist IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT * FROM route_summary LIMIT 3; SELECT avg_distance_km FROM route_summary WHERE avg_distance_km IS NOT NULL AND avg_distance_km > 0 LIMIT 3;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM locations;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM trips WHERE origin_id IS NOT NULL AND trip_duration_minutes IS NOT NULL AND trip_duration_minutes > 0 AND trip_start IS NOT NULL;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM trips t LEFT JOIN locations lo ON t.origin_id = lo.id LEFT JOIN locations ld ON t.destination_id = ld.id WHERE t.trip_duration_minutes IS NOT NULL AND t.trip_duration_minutes > 0 AND t.trip_duration_minutes < 50000 AND t.trip_start IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot smart_truck -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM trips t LEFT JOIN locations lo ON t.origin_id = lo.id LEFT JOIN locations ld ON t.destination_id = ld.id LEFT JOIN driver_summary ds ON t.driver_id = ds.driver_id LEFT JOIN vehicle_summary vs ON t.vehicle_id = vs.vehicle_id WHERE t.trip_duration_minutes IS NOT NULL AND t.trip_duration_minutes > 0 AND t.trip_duration_minutes < 50000 AND t.trip_start IS NOT NULL;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "SELECT ROUND\(MIN\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS min_dur, ROUND\(AVG\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS avg_dur, ROUND\(PERCENTILE_CONT\(0.5\) WITHIN GROUP \(ORDER BY trip_duration_minutes\) OVER\(\),2\) AS median_dur, ROUND\(MAX\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS max_dur, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM smart_truck.trips WHERE trip_duration_minutes > 0 AND eta_data_status=''available'' LIMIT 1;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "SELECT ROUND\(MIN\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS min_dur, ROUND\(AVG\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS avg_dur, ROUND\(MAX\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS max_dur, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM smart_truck.trips WHERE trip_duration_minutes > 0 AND eta_data_status=''available'';")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "SELECT ROUND\(AVG\(trip_duration_minutes\),2\) AS avg_dur, ROUND\(AVG\(avg_speed_kmph\),2\) AS avg_speed, ROUND\(AVG\(trip_km\),2\) AS avg_km, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM smart_truck.trips t JOIN smart_truck.locations lo ON t.origin_id = lo.id JOIN smart_truck.locations ld ON t.destination_id = ld.id WHERE lo.name=''JHARSUGUDA'' AND ld.name=''CHENNAI'' AND t.trip_duration_minutes > 0;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "SELECT avg_duration_min, avg_speed_kmph, avg_distance_km, trip_count FROM smart_truck.route_summary WHERE origin=''JHARSUGUDA'' AND destination=''CHENNAI'';")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "SELECT avg_duration, trip_count FROM smart_truck.route_time_patterns WHERE origin=''JHARSUGUDA'' AND destination=''CHENNAI'' AND hour_of_day=22 AND day_of_week=7;")

Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -proot -e "SELECT hour_of_day, day_of_week, avg_duration, trip_count FROM smart_truck.route_time_patterns WHERE origin=''JHARSUGUDA'' AND destination=''CHENNAI'' ORDER BY trip_count DESC LIMIT 10;")
